reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: This speaker works well enough to use around the house or in the garage. I have difficulty pairing other phones. It seems as though once you pair the first phone or device it does not want to connect to anything other device. Power life could be better and the sound quality is just ok.

reviews.text: This blue tooth speaker is easy to connect and plays whatever is on your phone. My only issue is that the overall volume is fairly low.

reviews.title: Great portable wireless speaker
reviews.text: This is a great portable Bluetooth speaker. I have used it out on the patio as well as in the garage, and while doing yard work. It also has great sound quality and can fill up a large outdoor space with sound. Great for having people over and being able to change songs without walking over to speaker.

reviews.title: Good first time buy
reviews.text: I bought this bluetooth speaker because my car did not have an aux port so i put this on the dash and played mysic through it and it sounded great. Its not the absolute loudest wen you are out and about but it definatly did the job.

reviews.text: Although the Braven BRV-1 Bluetooth Speaker was smaller than I thought it would be, it delivers big, high quality sound. Plus, it's waterproof, so you can take it outside without worrying about the weather.

reviews.title: Great Sound and LONG battery life
reviews.text: Wow, what a deal I got on this. My son carries this everywhere, even on our vacation. He has yet to charge it, and cannot believe the sound. This thing is waterproof and weather proof. Of course the first thing he did was submerge it in water. After it dried completely it sounded perfect. He also used it in the snow. Great price and great product.

reviews.title: Nice speaker

reviews.title: Braven BRV-1
reviews.text:
Purchased two thinking the Braven BRV-1 wireless speaker would be good value. Weak volume and ability to produce realistic music acoustics, they sound hollow and weak. 

Returned them both, for the heart pounding sound machine the Braven XXL, a room rocking sound machine.

reviews.author: Braven

reviews.title: Rugged waterproof durable
reviews.text: This little speaker is great for traveling with a labtop or smart phone, very durable, good range of volume and is in cased in a rubber armor made for abuse! While using Bluetooth you can receive and answer phone calls

reviews.title: Great gift for fisherman
reviews.text: Purchased this as a gift for my husband to take on his boat while fishing. He likes the USB charging cord so he doesn't have to carry multiple chargers. The sound quality is clear and loud enough to hear out on the lake.
reviews.author: HRinKC

reviews.title: Works Great and easy to use. Sounds good.
reviews.text: This was easy to use and setup. The sound is very good. It is water proof so it will work great for me to take to the beach or in the fishing boat. It is small and light weight. A real nice unit for the money.
reviews.author: IowaFarmer

reviews.title: Perfect little sound
reviews.text: Perfect for portable sound. Lightweight, waterproof and the rubber casing is a great added feature that protects the unit very well. It's not VERY loud but it's loud enough for most conditions.
reviews.author: IMLOU

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: Unit was good value. Moderate clarity - good for out doors
reviews.author: Anand

reviews.title: Great value!
reviews.text: Bought on sale. Great value! Wanted a durable, outdoor, waterproof speaker, and the added bonus of being able to charge phone from speaker is great too!
reviews.author: BestBuyRocks14

reviews.title: Heavy duty plus great sound
reviews.text: I have already taken this speaker on 2 beach vacations and it still looks brand new. It has great sound and even better battery life.
reviews.author: TB5900

reviews.title: Used when camping
reviews.text: We take this every time we go camping and it works great. Sound is perfect for a campsite. Battery last long enough to use on and off for a few days. Build quality is excellent.
reviews.author: Jason

reviews.title: Best for the $$$
reviews.text: This speaker is awesome for the money! It has great sound and the fact that it is waterproof is a huge selling point!
reviews.author: Trav

reviews.title: Little Speaker Packs a Big Punch
reviews.text: I love this little speaker! I bought it for my boyfriend last year because I knew he really wanted a Bluetooth speaker like The Pill, but I could not afford that. I read reviews for this speaker and was able to test it out in the store. I love that it has so much bass and can be heard from the basement all the way out on the front lawn. It also helps that it is waterproof, ports can be covered and it can charge other devices!

reviews.title: Okay...
reviews.text: This speaker is okay for the money... kind of low sounding....

reviews.text: Love how small and portable this guy is. my daughter can carry it around with no problem and it sounds great.

reviews.title: Speaker
reviews.text: It's not as loud as I thought but very indestructable. I overcharged it once and now the charge is completely gone and when any bluetooth device is on even when using the AUX it picks up and interrupts the audio... I miss the old Jam Touch, but this will do!
reviews.author: Lblake1

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth speaker
reviews.text: This is a great speaker. Good sound and rugged. We have taken this to the beach and it can withstand the sand, heat and still sound great. Pairing is easy and simple with all types of phones. It's definitely loud enough to keep you entertained for hours. Also love the USB port to charge any device.
reviews.author: Mrcluv1

reviews.title: Rockin good
reviews.text: Owned a few Bluetooth speakers; liked none. This unit is great . Excellent volume, great bass response and not "tinny". Fantastic value.

reviews.title: Great sound but
reviews.text: Has a hard time connecting to the Bluetooth on my iPhone. I end having to "forget" the speaker so it will connect.

reviews.title: Great speaker
reviews.text: Purchased for my Grandson, and he is quite pleased with this product.

reviews.title: Didnt work for our needs
reviews.text: We returned it the next day. Didnt work for our needs. Just used for for an outside house project wasnt loud enough.

reviews.title: As advertised!
reviews.text: This little guy does exactly as described. It packs a nice punch is waterproof. I use it around or in the pool and on my boat. Very portable and rugged.

reviews.title: Good sound
reviews.text: The sound is pretty clear and loud and the prize is reasonable
reviews.author: Best

reviews.title: Great Outdoor speaker
reviews.text: I bought this speaker to take on a beach vacation. It was worth every cent, dropped in the sand, drinks spilled on it, saltwater splashed on it and I just keeps on going! I would recommend this speaker for anyone who wants a tough outdoor Bluetooth speaker.
reviews.author: WorkingDad

reviews.title: Need more volume!!
reviews.text: Good battery life although I've had better for less. Sound is nice but the volume just isn't enough, find.myself pushing the + button for more volume all the time. Like i said before ive had better for less so the original $100 price tag would not cut it with me.It's built nicely feels solid but going back to volume issue I just wish it had more.
reviews.author: iknownothing

reviews.title: Awesome sound
reviews.text: Easy to use. Great signal. Great sound. Long battery life.
reviews.author: Tb5900

reviews.title: Bluetooth Speaker
reviews.text: Great sound for the price. Never heard of Braven prior to browsing the aisles of BB and a store clerk sold me on the brand. Purchased this as a gift and the recipient loves the speaker. Great for either the pool or shower area. Decent sound from a small package. Most likely will by the solar powered one for the back yard.
reviews.author: Alim

reviews.title: Nice Speaker
reviews.text: Bought this Bluetooth speaker for the beach. Good sound, adequate volume, and nice bass punch for size. Good battery life as well
reviews.author: hail2sknz

reviews.title: Lousy blue tooth comm's, broke within 2 weeks
reviews.text: Disappointing. This speaker worked for 2 weeks, but frequently cut out the signal from phone Bluetooth. Then I would have to reset it. This happened sometimes 12x / 45 minutes. Then it just stopped working. Waste of $50.
reviews.author: Morf

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Goes anywhere, sound is awesome , great value .....
reviews.author: Rookie

reviews.title: Good option for the price
reviews.text: Punchy sound from a small package. Fairly loud as well. The size and water proof rating take away from the sound quality. The treble is a bit muted and muffled in comparison to better speakers. Bass is ample for the size. Battery life is acceptable to me, but there's better for more money. Very rugged and the water proof feature makes me never worry about breaking it. Works for me.
reviews.author: ShadowWulf369

reviews.title: Great for listening, in the shower
reviews.text:
The speaker was strongly recommended by Best Buy staff, and it has lived up to my subsequent expectations

Ideal for continuing to listen to a radio broadcast, eg from smartphone, whilst taking a shower - It's now part of my daily routine

I'm fairly sure the speaker isn't waterproof, so I wouldn't recommend submerging it in a bath - However, it seems to be fine, hanging from the shower head attachment, where it gets a regular spray of warm shower water

It's also suitable for outdoor use, and the rubber like outer casing ought to be durable enough for most knocks and falls
reviews.author: Scottie

reviews.title: Great for the beach
reviews.text: This little speaker has great sound for its size. I took mine to the beach and actually had to turn it down a few times. Also, my sister accidentally dropped it in the water, but it still kept on working. This appears to be a great deal for a good portable waterproof bluetooth speaker.
reviews.author: Moose

reviews.title: Great Product
reviews.text: Very nice product. Great looking, waterproof (haven't tested yet). Holds charge, very impressed. Volume just below awesome. If your looking 4 a wireless Bluetooth speaker & can get 4 $49.99 (on sale). I would recommend pulling the trigger.
reviews.author: CTJaguars

reviews.title: Great Speaker
reviews.text: It really works well and handles falls and drops like a pro.
reviews.author: mommytonya

reviews.title: Great for tubing down the river
reviews.text: Took this on the salt river and it was great. Volume is a little low when on the river but it is perfect. I like that the output and aux cords aren't open
reviews.author: Muisc6

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Bass not so deep and loud limited , over all good purchase
reviews.author: Kostas

reviews.title: does the trick
reviews.text: i was looking for a speaker that i can use in the bathroom so i could listen to music through my phone while i took a shower. I wanted something that was loud enough where i could hear it over the running water. Not only does it deliver in that department. It is also waterproof, not splash resist like other speaker. This thing is WATERPROOF. I threw it in our pool and let it float(kinda) in the water while i swam around. back to topic, not only that it is loud enough, i can bring it in the shower with me and have the music playing right there with me, instead of outside the door.
reviews.author: gwolf86

reviews.title: Nice sound, very durable
reviews.text: This was actually a present for a family member. I got them one because we enjoyed ours so much!
reviews.author: Amanda

reviews.title: Luv it!
reviews.text: Great sound and last long! Great value too! We had one speaker but wanted one for the pool and this is perfect
reviews.author: Hardworker

reviews.title: Great small speaker
reviews.text: Great sound for such a small speaker. Good value if you can buy it on sale.
reviews.author: krnn

reviews.title: Product is "OK" but I would not buy again.
reviews.text: My goal in purchasing was to boost sound from my laptop, but the sound was barely amplified over what I could get without the product and the volume controls were difficult to manipulate. It is durable, but that's it.
reviews.author: Danimaelsa

reviews.title: Volume
reviews.text: Overall I like the speaker. I just wish it had a little more top end volume.
reviews.author: FamilyMan100

reviews.title: Wow!
reviews.text: I love this Bluetooth speaker!!! Great product, exactly what I wanted! Sound ROCKS!!!
reviews.author: Hugh

reviews.title: Good speaker fair price
reviews.text: Got this for my boat. Great sound , have not had any problems with it. Was just what we were looking for.
reviews.author: Pamcakes

reviews.title: Great sound for price; goes anywhere
reviews.text: I got a great deal on this Bluetooth speaker. Easy to use, good sound, goes anywhere. (I won't worry about getting sand in it on the beach, or leaving it on the deck when it begins to rain!) Plus, I got it at a great sale price by watching for special sales online.
reviews.author: Serendipity

reviews.title: Great Speaker:)
reviews.text: This speaker is used at the beach, pool and on the lake in our boat. There has been spray from surf and lake. It has spent hours in the sun with no battery problems. This speaker sounds great and I will be buying as a gift this Christmas.
reviews.author: RunHouse
